EnergyStage1Messages: I can keep moving for a while.
Food is not a problem right now.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
EnergyStage2Messages: My stomach feels a little empty.
I should keep an eye out for food.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
EnergyStage3Messages: My stomach is starting to hurt.
I can feel my strength fading.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
EnergyStage4Messages: I do not know how much longer I can go without eating.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
WaterStage1Messages: Water is not an issue right now.
I can travel without worrying about thirst.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
WaterStage2Messages: I need to remember the next well.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
WaterStage3Messages: My head is starting to ache.
I should not ignore this thirst.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
WaterStage4Messages: I should remember this if I live long enough.
BloodStage1Messages: The world keeps finding new ways to test me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BloodStage2Messages: I should avoid losing more blood.
That blood loss is starting to show.
The world keeps finding new ways to test me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BloodStage3Messages: I need to recover before pushing further.
The blood loss is slowing me down.

I should remember this if I live long enough.
ShockStage2Messages: I need a second to steady myself.
My hands are not as steady as they should be.
The world keeps finding new ways to test me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ShockStage3Messages: My body is struggling to respond.
I need to get behind cover.
The world keeps finding new ways to test me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ShockStage4Messages: I am about to black out.
I cannot stay conscious much longer.
The world keeps finding new ways to test me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Cold_Mild_Messages: I should remember this if I live long enough.
Cold_Moderate_Messages: My clothes are not keeping the chill out.
I need shelter or a fire.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Cold_Severe_Messages: This cold is cutting through me.
I can barely feel my hands.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Cold_Critical_Messages: My body is shutting down from the cold.
I need fire, shelter, or dry clothes immediately.
I am not going to survive this cold much longer.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Hot_Mild_Messages: The heat is starting to build.
I may need to slow down.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Hot_Moderate_Messages: I need shade or lighter clothing.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Hot_Severe_Messages: My head feels heavy from the heat.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Hot_Critical_Messages: I feel like I am going to collapse.
I need water and shade now.
My body cannot handle this heat much longer.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Sickness_Early_Messages: I should remember this if I live long enough.
Sickness_Moderate_Messages: I should remember this if I live long enough.
Sickness_Severe_Messages: I should remember this if I live long enough.
Sickness_Critical_Messages: I feel like I am dying.
My body is fighting something bad.
I do not know how much longer I can keep going.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Bleeding_One_Messages: Blood is running down my body.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Bleeding_Multiple_Messages: I need to stop the bleeding now.
I have more than one wound open.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Bleeding_Critical_Messages: My vision is starting to fade.
If I do not stop this bleeding, I am dead.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BrokenLegMessages: I cannot move properly like this.
Every step sends pain through my leg.
I need a splint before I can travel safely.
Running is not an option now.
This leg will get me killed if I do not treat it.
Infected_Far_Messages: I do not think I am alone.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Infected_Close_Messages: I need to watch my noise.
One wrong move and they will hear me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Infected_VeryClose_Messages: They are right on top of me.
I can hear them just outside.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
Infected_Surrounded_Messages: There are too many of them.
If they hear me, this could go bad fast.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
HungerThirstMessages: I need food and water soon.
My stomach is empty and my mouth is dry.
I cannot keep moving like this without supplies.
Hunger and thirst are starting to wear me down.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
HungerColdMessages: The hunger is worse in this cold.
I need food and warmth before my body gives up.
My stomach is empty and my hands are going numb.
The cold is biting harder with nothing in my stomach.
HungerInfectedMessages: I need food, but the infected are too close.
My stomach is empty, and I can hear infected nearby.
I should not search for food with infected this close.
I need supplies, but I need to stay quiet.
The hunger is pushing me toward danger.
ThirstColdMessages: My mouth is dry and my hands are freezing.
The cold is slowing me down, and the thirst is getting worse.
I should find shelter and something safe to drink.
I cannot ignore thirst just because I am cold.
HotThirstMessages: The heat and thirst are draining me.
I need water before this heat gets worse.
My mouth is dry and my body is overheating.
I need shade and water soon.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
SickColdMessages: The sickness and cold are wearing me down.
I feel ill, and the cold is making everything worse.
My body cannot fight sickness and cold forever.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BleedingInfectedMessages: I am bleeding, and the infected are close.
The blood might draw attention. I need to move.
I need to stop this bleeding before they find me.
I cannot fight them like this while I am losing blood.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
HungerColdInfectedMessages: My stomach is empty, the cold is biting, and I can hear infected nearby.
I need food, warmth, and a way out before those infected find me.
I am hungry, freezing, and not alone out here.
Every step feels heavier with hunger, cold, and infected close by.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
HungerThirstColdMessages: I need food, water, and warmth before my body gives out.
My stomach is empty, my mouth is dry, and the cold is biting.
I cannot survive long like this.
I need shelter and supplies now.
Every basic need is catching up with me.
ExtremeSurvivalMessages: Everything is going wrong at once.
My body is failing, and this place is not safe.
I need shelter, supplies, and a way out now.
I cannot keep surviving like this.
One more mistake could finish me.
I need to stop, think, and survive the next few minutes.
My body is screaming for help.
I am running out of time.
I need to deal with the worst problem first.
This is how people die out here.
CriticalSurvivalMessages: I need to survive the next minute before thinking about anything else.
Everything hurts, everything is wrong, and I am not safe.
I am close to the edge.
I need help, but there is nobody coming.
I cannot let panic take over.
Stop the bleeding. Find shelter. Stay alive.
I do not know how much longer I can keep going.
ColdInfectedMessages: The cold is making my hands stiff, and I can hear infected nearby.
I need warmth, but the infected are too close.
I should not stay here, but I am too cold to think straight.
The cold is bad enough without infected nearby.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BleedingColdMessages: I am bleeding, and the cold is creeping in.
My blood is running warm, but everything else feels cold.
I need to stop the bleeding and get warm.
The cold makes my hands clumsy while I try to stop the blood.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
SickThirstMessages: I feel sick, and thirst is making it worse.
I need clean water and medicine.
My stomach turns, and my mouth is dry.
This sickness is harder to fight without water.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
HungerHotMessages: The heat is draining what little strength I have left.
My body feels weak in this heat.
I need food, shade, and a moment to breathe.
The heat makes the hunger feel worse.
HungerSickMessages: I feel sick, and the hunger is making it worse.
My stomach is empty, but I do not know if I can keep food down.
I need food, but my body feels wrong.
The sickness is eating at me as much as the hunger.
I need to treat this before I get any weaker.
HungerBleedingMessages: I am hungry and losing blood. This is bad.
My body needs food, but first I need to stop the bleeding.
The blood loss is making the hunger feel worse.
I need to stop bleeding and find food.
ThirstBleedingMessages: I am losing blood and drying out.
I need water, but this bleeding comes first.
My mouth is dry and my wound is still open.
I cannot keep bleeding like this.
I need to patch myself up and find water.
ThirstInfectedMessages: I need water, but the infected are nearby.
My throat is dry, and I can hear them moving.
The well is useless if I get caught reaching it.
I need to stay quiet and find water.
HotSickMessages: The heat is making this sickness worse.
I need shade, water, and medicine.
My head is pounding from heat and illness.
I cannot tell if this is fever or the weather.
HotBleedingMessages: The heat is making me feel faint.
I need to stop the bleeding and cool down.
My vision is swimming in this heat.
I cannot keep losing blood under this sun.
HotInfectedMessages: The heat is draining me, and the infected are close.
I need shade, but I cannot stop here.
Sweat is running into my eyes, and I can hear them nearby.
The heat is making every sound feel closer.
I need to move before they hear me.
SickBleedingMessages: I am sick and bleeding. My body cannot take much more.
The wound is open, and I already feel ill.
I need treatment before this gets worse.
This sickness will not heal while I am losing blood.
SickInfectedMessages: I feel sick, and the infected are nearby.
I can barely focus with them this close.
I need medicine, but I need to survive this first.
Every cough could give me away.
I should not be near infected while I feel this weak.
HungerThirstHotMessages: I am hungry, thirsty, and overheating.
The heat is burning through what little strength I have left.
I need shade, water, and food.
My body is running on nothing in this heat.
I cannot keep moving like this.
HungerThirstInfectedMessages: I need food and water, but the infected are too close.
My body is empty, and I can hear them nearby.
I need supplies, but searching now could get me killed.
Hunger and thirst are pushing me into danger.
I need to stay quiet and find supplies.
ThirstHotInfectedMessages: I need water, I am overheating, and the infected are close.
The heat is drying me out, but I cannot stop here.
My throat is dry, sweat is in my eyes, and I can hear them nearby.
I need water, shade, and distance from the infected.
This heat is making me careless around infected.
SickColdInfectedMessages: I feel sick, the cold is biting, and infected are nearby.
I need warmth and medicine, but I cannot stop here.
My body is weak, my hands are numb, and I can hear them close.
I need shelter before the sickness and infected finish me.
Every sound feels closer while I am this weak.
BleedingColdInfectedMessages: I am bleeding, freezing, and the infected are close.
My hands are numb, and I need to stop this bleeding now.
The cold is slowing me down while the infected close in.
I need shelter, bandages, and a way out.
If I cannot stop the bleeding, the cold or infected will finish me.
BleedingSickInfectedMessages: I am sick, bleeding, and the infected are close.
My body is failing, and I can hear them nearby.
I need bandages, medicine, and silence.
If they find me now, I am done.
BrokenLegHungerMessages: My leg is ruined, and I still need food.
I cannot search properly with this leg and an empty stomach.
The hunger is bad, but moving on this leg is worse.
I need food, but every step hurts.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BrokenLegThirstMessages: My leg is broken, and my mouth is dry.
I need water, but I can barely move.
The thirst is pushing me forward, but this leg is holding me back.
I need to find water before crawling becomes impossible.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BrokenLegColdMessages: My leg is broken, and the cold is setting in.

BrokenLegHotMessages: My leg is broken, and the heat is draining me.

BrokenLegInfectedMessages: My leg is broken, and infected are nearby.
